DANC409 Contact Improvisation (2 Credits)

Discovery and cultivation of the principles and skills of Contact Improvisation dance technique.

Restriction: Permission of ARHU-School of Theatre, Dance & Performance Studies department.

Repeatable to: 4 credits.

Credit Only Granted for. DANC489C or DANC409.
